2604.14125.title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
2604.14125.paper_summary: While end-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, fine-tuning them on narrow control data often compromises the profound reasoning capabilities inherited from their base Vision-Language Models (VLMs). To resolve this fundamental trade-off, we propose HiVLA, a visual-grounded-centric hierarchical framework that explicitly decouples high-level semantic planning from low-level motor control. In high-level part, a VLM planner first performs task decomposition and visual grounding to generate structured plans, comprising a subtask instruction and a precise target bounding box. Then, to translate this plan into physical actions, we introduce a flow-matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert in low-level part equipped with a novel cascaded cross-attention mechanism. This design sequentially fuses global context, high-resolution object-centric crops and skill semantics, enabling the DiT to focus purely on robust execution. Our decoupled architecture preserves the VLM's zero-shot reasoning while allowing independent improvement of both components. Extensive experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that HiVLA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end baselines, particularly excelling in long-horizon skill composition and the fine-grained manipulation of small objects in cluttered scenes.
2604.14125.paper_summary_zh: 雖然端到端的視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型為機器人操作提供了一個有前景的範式，但在狹窄控制數據上進行微調往往會妨礙其從基礎視覺-語言模型 (VLM) 繼承的深刻推理能力。為了解決這一根本的權衡，我們提出了 HiVLA，一個以視覺為基礎的分層框架，明確地將高層語義規劃與低層運動控制解耦。在高層部分，VLM 規劃器首先進行任務分解和視覺定位，以生成結構化計劃，該計劃包括一個子任務指令和一個精確的目標邊界框。然後，為了將這一計劃轉化為物理行動，我們在低層部分引入了一個流匹配擴散Transformer (DiT) 行動專家，並配備了一種新穎的級聯交叉注意力機制。這一設計順序融合了全球上下文、高解析度的物體中心裁剪和技能語義，使 DiT 能夠純粹專注於穩健的執行。我們的解耦架構保留了 VLM 的零樣本推理，同時允許兩個組件的獨立改進。在模擬和現實世界中的廣泛實驗表明，HiVLA 顯著超越了最先進的端到端基準，特別是在長期技能組合和在雜亂場景中對小物體的精細操作方面表現優異。
2604.14125.author: Tianshuo Yang et.al.
2604.14125.authors: Tianshuo Yang, Guanyu Chen, Yutian Chen, Zhixuan Liang, Yitian Liu, Zanxin Chen, Chunpu Xu, Haotian Liang, Jiangmiao Pang, Yao Mu, Ping Luo
